use_cases: Primary call-to-action triggers for forms and page navigation
Destructive action confirmations with the destructive variant
Secondary action buttons for less prominent user interactions
Icon-only buttons for compact UI actions
Link-styled buttons for inline navigation within text content
ai_summary: A reusable button component with configurable variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and includes proper accessibility support with focus-visible states and disabled handling. Part of the shadcn/ui design system.
